title: AFT Rejects, Recalls, Error Corrections, and Other Exception Items
body_text:
AFT Rejects, Recalls, Error Corrections, and Other Exception Items
1	Introduction to AFT Rejects, Recalls, Error Corrections, and Other Exception Items
1.1	Overview of AFT Rejects, Recalls, Error Corrections, and Other Exception Items
This Part explains how to:
process AFT Rejects, Recalls, Error Corrections, and other exception items,
handle rejected AFT files and AFT transactions,
re-route unpostable transactions,
receive offsetting debit transactions for Direct Deposits, and
initiate and receive AFT trace requests.
Related Payment Solutions Manual Parts
AFT Reports Part
File Exchange and Report Distribution Part
Online Return System (ORS) Part
AFT Returns and AFT Notice of Change Transactions Part
